courseTitle: Applied Game Mathematics, Technical Art, and Production Pipelines
title: Version-Control Collaboration Game
genericDescription: Use branching, commits, reviews, issue tracking, and build notes; avoid integration surprises; document individual contributions.
specificDescription: In pairs or small teams, build a game with at least 30 meaningful commits, issue tracking, and a final merge review. Each student must own a visible technical or content feature. The final repository must include release notes and known issues.
gradingRubric: 25 pts version-control hygiene; 25 pts working integrated game; 20 pts contribution clarity; 15 pts issue tracking/build review; 15 pts team retrospective.
